bug_report.summary: Godot splash window title no longer shows project name and icon appears missing/blank
steps_to_reproduce: Launch the Godot editor and observe the splash/loading window while the editor loads.
expected_behaviors: Splash/loading window title should include the project name (e.g., "<project> - Godot Engine").
Splash/loading window should show the Godot window icon in the title bar.
actual_behaviors: Splash/loading window title shows only "Godot" (project name missing).
Top-left title bar icon is blank/white instead of the Godot icon.
